items.headline: South Korea stocks lead regional gains as Trump comments signal Iran war de-escalation
items.summary: Trump said he decided to back off from his recent threat to order strikes on Iranian energy infrastructure "based on the fact we're negotiating."

items.headline: Iran Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei received blue checks on X, despite sanctions policy
items.summary: Iran's new Supreme Leader, Mojtaba Khamenei, managed to subscribe to X Premium on his English-language account before his blue check was eventually removed.

items.headline: Oil drops more than 4% as Trump signals Iran talks despite Tehran denial
items.summary: Oil prices fell after Donald Trump that Washington and Tehran are "in negotiations right now" and indicated Iran is keen to reach a peace agreement.

items.headline: Meta must pay $375 million for violating New Mexico law in child exploitation case, jury rules
items.summary: Jury reaches a verdict in New Mexico trial in which the state's attorney general alleged that Meta failed to safeguard its family of apps from child predators.

items.headline: SK Hynix files confidentially for U.S. listing as it rides 'unprecedented growth' in memory market
items.summary: SK Hynix has made a confidential filing for a potential listing in the U.S. this year, as the company looks to expand production.

items.headline: Emily Gregory projected to win Florida special election to represent Trump, Mar-a-Lago
items.summary: President Donald Trump had endorsed fellow Republican Jon Maples in the special election against Emily Gregory, the Democratic nominee.

items.headline: Oil prices fall, stock futures climb on reports U.S. has proposed a cease-fire to Iran
items.summary: Global oil prices tumbled and U.S. stock futures rose on Tuesday evening following reports that the U.S., via intermediary Pakistan, had sent Iran a 15-point plan to end the conflict in the Middle East, now in its fourth week.

items.headline: Meta makes 'big bet' on top leaders with stock options as pressure builds to catch up in AI
items.summary: Meta is granting stock options to top executives as pressure on the company intensifies in the AI battle.

items.headline: Gold jumps over 2% as oil slump eases inflation fears amid Trump Iran talks

items.headline: Circle posts worst day on record as proposed law could limit stablecoin yield
